The two teams were ranked ninth and 10th in Asia during qualifying and met in a two-leg playoff last November.Iraq won 3-2 on aggregate to eliminate the UAE and advanced to the intercontinental playoffs in Mexico. On March 31, Iraq is scheduled to face either Bolivia or Suriname in a match that will decide a World Cup place.FIFA’s rules state it may replace a withdrawn team “with another association,” without specifying that the replacement must come from the same continental confederation.There is precedent for late changes. Denmark won the 1992 European Championship after receiving a late invitation from UEFA. Yugoslavia had qualified but was removed less than two weeks before the tournament due to United Nations sanctions during the Balkans conflict.Teams have declined to participate in past World Cups, though not in recent decades. The 1950 World Cup in Brazil featured 13 teams instead of 16 after India and Scotland declined to take part.
Article Summary: Iran is scheduled to play its three group-stage matches in the US from June 15-26, with two games in Inglewood, California, and one in Seattle. The tournament is being co-hosted by the United States, Canada and Mexico. Iran has qualified for six of the past eight World Cups.

Article Title: Against all odds: Bangladesh women set for historic Asian Cup debut despite social, political hurdles
Article Text:
Bangladesh captain Afeida Khandaker (Pic credit: AFC)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Bangladesh’s women’s football team will step onto the continental stage for the first time at the AFC Women’s Asian Cup, carrying not just national hopes but the weight of years of social resistance and hardship.In a country of 170 million where social stigma, poverty and conservative attitudes have long pushed girls away from sport, qualification itself has been a landmark achievement.“Many more girls would have joined us if the community had been even slightly supportive,” captain Afeida Khandaker told AFP ahead of their March 3 opener in Australia.In rural Bangladesh especially, girls are discouraged — and sometimes harassed — for playing football.“Girls often had to quit football after primary school,” Khandaker said. “Neighbours would complain about how teenage girls could play football while wearing shorts.”Beyond criticism, many face pressure to marry before turning 18. Local league player Ennima Khanom Richi, 20, told AFP that several teammates were forced into arranged marriages. “Families often cannot bear the social pressure, so they stop their girls from playing,” she said.Political turbulence has compounded the struggle. Islamist activists, emboldened after the 2024 uprising, have accused women athletes of immodesty, with several matches cancelled last year following pitch invasions and threats.“My sister and I both wanted to be footballers, and for that my parents — especially my mother — had to endure bitter words,” Khandaker said. Her father, Khandaker Arif Hossain Prince, told AFP many aspiring players come from marginalised families. “Some of their parents are rickshaw pullers, labourers, or tea vendors… Some cannot afford it and quit football.”Yet attitudes are slowly shifting. “We didn’t even have a national women’s team before 2008,” Mahfuza Akter Kiron, head of the Bangladesh Football Federation’s women’s wing, told AFP. “It was a real struggle for them to play football.”Coach Saiful Bari Titu called it “a privilege” to even speak about the team, adding: “They faced a lot of protests.”As Bangladesh prepare to face nine-time champions China, Khandaker remains realistic. “China and North Korea are far ahead of us in the rankings… but we will give our best.”
Article Summary: Bangladesh's women's football team will play in the AFC Women's Asian Cup. Qualification is a landmark achievement in a country where girls are discouraged from playing football. Captain Afeida Khandaker says many more girls would have joined the team if the community had been more supportive.

Article Title: Iran’s FIFA World Cup participation in US now in doubt amid ongoing war
Article Text:
Iran national football team (Reuters Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

The head of Iran’s football federation is worried that the national team might not play in the World Cup matches hosted in the U.S. He said recent military attacks on Iran by the United States and Israel have made it unclear if the team will be able to participate."What is certain is that after this attack, we cannot be expected to look forward to the World Cup with hope," Mehdi Taj told sports portal Varzesh3 as Iran traded strikes with Israel as part of a widening war prompted by the bombardment.Iran is in Group G at the World Cup and is set to play New Zealand in Inglewood, California, on June 15, Belgium on June 21, and Egypt in Seattle on June 26.The tournament is being hosted by the U.S.,Canada, and Mexico from June 11 to July 19.Iranian fans were already banned from entering the U.S. under an earlier travel ban from the Trump administration.FIFA has not yet responded to questions about whether Iran will be able to take part in the World Cup.The United States and Israel carried out a second day of military attacks on Iran this Sunday. This follows the death of Iran’s top leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, which has left the country’s future uncertain and created a high risk of more fighting across the entire Middle East
Article Summary: Mehdi Taj is the head of Iran’s football federation. He said recent military attacks on Iran by the United States and Israel have made it unclear if the team will be able to participate. The tournament is being hosted by the U.S.,Canada, and Mexico from June 11 to July 19.

Article Title: ISL: Hosts Odisha come from behind to earn a point against Chennaiyin
Article Text:
ISL 2026: Chennaiyin FC settle for a point in spirited draw against Odisha FC

T20 World Cup: Gautam Gambhir on Sanju Samson, Jasprit Bumrah and record chase vs West Indies

There was hardly anything to separate the two sides locking horns at Kalinga Stadium on Sunday as Odisha FC came from behind to share the honours and points with Chennaiyin FC in an Indian Super League (ISL) match in Bhubaneswar.While this was the second draw in as many matches for hosts Odisha, the 1-1 result helped the visitors pick up their first point of the season following consecutive defeats in their first two rounds of games.Despite a drab first 45 minutes, the Marina Machans went ahead at the stroke of half-time with Elsinho scoring his first goal in ISL. The Juggernauts drew level in the 68th minute with captain Carlos Delgado rising to the occasion.Except for the possession, which was heavily on CFC’s side (66%), both the teams matched each other on almost every count and lacked penetration and creativity in the final third.During the entire game each of them managed only two shots on target, while off target it was four for Odisha and six for Chennaiyin. In the first half both sides managed only one shot on target and that reflected the sides’ poor form in offence.The breakthrough came in the first-half stoppage time when winger Farukh Choudhary’s inswinging corner was headed home by midfielder Elsinho to bring in the club’s first goal of the season to go 1-0 up. Moments later, CFC goalkeeper Mohammad Nawaz preserved the lead with an acrobatic save to go into the breather with their nose ahead.The visitors continued to press hard after the restart, with Imran Khan and Lalrinliana Hnamte introduced together in the 57th minute in place of Irfan Yadwad and the impressive Maheson Singh. With fresh legs CFC tried to maintain their attacking intent only to see it go to waste in the final third.However, it was the home side who equalised in the 68th minute quite against the run of play, when Delgado headed home a Lalthathanga ‘Puitea’ Khawlhring assist much to the delight of the home fans. The Clifford Miranda-coached side tried to restore their lead, but the scoreline remained level at the final whistle.With the first point of the season in their kitty, CFC will try to build momentum when they face southern rivals Kerala Blasters next on Saturday as Odisha host table toppers and heavyweights Mohun Bagan Super Giant on Friday.In another match played in Mumbai, a late equaliser by Lallianzuala Chhangte helped Mumbai City FC secure a 1-1 draw against NorthEast United FC .
Article Summary: Odisha FC came from behind to share the honours and points with Chennaiyin FC in an Indian Super League (ISL) match in Bhubaneswar. The Marina Machans went ahead at the stroke of half-time with Elsinho scoring his first goal in ISL. The Juggernauts drew level in the 68th minute with captain Carlos Delgado rising to the occasion.

Article Title: Explained: How much will it cost to watch the FIFA World Cup?
Article Text:
FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy (PTI Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

How many tickets are available and how strong is demand?

Ticket Prices Rise at the Expanded World Cup

Prices May Go Higher

Other Costs for Fans

Tickets for the World Cup, which starts in North America in 100 days, are expensive — costing nearly $900 for the opening match and more than $8,000 for the final.AFP Sport explains the cost of attending games at the tournament.According to FIFA, nearly seven million tickets have been made available for the World Cup. Each person can buy up to four tickets per match and a maximum of 40 tickets for the whole tournament.About two million tickets were sold in the first lottery held in October. A second sales phase in December and January, also run as a lottery, received a record 508 million ticket requests, showing huge global demand.FIFA has not confirmed how many tickets were sold in that phase. However, the most in-demand matches include the Group K game between Colombia and Portugal in Miami on June 27, co-hosts Mexico vs South Korea in Guadalajara on June 18, and the final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on July 19.There will be 104 matches at this World Cup, the first time the tournament will have 48 teams.But ticket prices for the biggest games are very high.A fan group said tickets were first promised to start at $21, but the cheapest tickets actually sold have been around $60. For many big matches, most tickets cost at least $200.For the final, the cheapest seats cost about $2,000, while the best seats go up to $8,680.On resale websites, prices are even higher. One ticket for the final was listed for over $140,000, much more than its original price.FIFA president Gianni Infantino said prices are high because demand is very strong."In the US in particular there is this thing called dynamic pricing, meaning the prices will go up or down", depending on the match in question, he said.After complaints, FIFA released some cheaper $60 tickets, but these are limited and only available to fans of teams that qualified.FIFA is also selling VIP packages that include better seats and lounge access. These packages can cost between $2,900 and $4,500 for some matches.FIFA will release more tickets from April on a first-come, first-served basis.Fans can also buy tickets from resale websites, but sellers can set their own prices. In the US and Canada, there are no strict rules on resale prices.For example, A "category three" seat -- the highest section of the stands -- for the tournament's opening game between Mexico and South Africa at Mexico City's Azteca Stadium on June 11 was recently listed at $5,324, compared to an original price of $895. Other sites such as SeatGeek and StubHub were selling tickets at slightly lower prices.Fans also have to pay for parking, which is expensive. Parking can cost $100 in some cities and up to $300 in others.An alternative for visiting fans who do not have match tickets is to go to one of the Fan Festivals in and around the 16 host cities. The Fan Fest in Kansas City will be able to welcome up to 25,000 people. In New York, the US Open tennis venue at Flushing Meadows will be transformed into a fan zone holding up to 10,000 paying visitors, albeit only from June 17 to 28.
Article Summary: FIFA says nearly seven million tickets have been made available for the World Cup. Each person can buy up to four tickets per match and a maximum of 40 tickets for the whole tournament. The most in-demand matches include the Group K game between Colombia and Portugal in Miami on June 27.

Article Title: Trent Mcduffie Trade Rumors: NFL Trade Rumors: Chiefs face defining Trent McDuffie decision as Los Angeles Rams monitor All-Pro CB
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Chiefs face defining Trent McDuffie decision as Los Angeles Rams monitor All-Pro CB (Getty)

Rams’ aggressive approach places Trent McDuffie at center of offseason storm

The Kansas City Chiefs have entered a pivotal stretch with Trent McDuffie. Trade rumors heated up after a new update connected the L.A Rams to a potential splash move for an All-Pro CB. With free agency nearing, the timing has raised real questions inside league circles.KC must now choose between securing one of its defensive pillars long-term or leveraging its value in a market that appears aggressive. The Rams’ public viewpoint only adds pressure to a decision that could reshape the Chiefs’ 2026 plans.The latest spark came from The Athletic’s Rams reporter Nate Atkins. On March 3, Atkins posted on X after covering general manager Les Snead’s offseason availability.“Les Snead sounds like a GM ready to be aggressive to maximize Matthew Stafford’s window,” Atkins wrote. He added three clear points from those conversations: the Rams are open to trading a first-round pick for a proven player, the secondary is a major focus, and trade talks are intense this time of year. He also quoted the key line: “Is there an All-Pro that you could add?” That question fits Trent McDuffie.McDuffie earned first-team All-Pro honors and remains one of the most trusted DBs in the league.He enters his age-26 season in 2026 and carries a cap hit north of $13.6 million. The Chiefs can clear that entire figure with a trade. Extension talks have not produced a deal yet, which keeps the door open.Team GM Brett Veach has publicly alluded to his desire to retain core players. The league made that clear with Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce, and Chris Jones in recent years. Still, the back story shows Veach will move on from elite guys if the numbers do not align. Also, the Tyreek Hill trade to the Miami Dolphins in 2022 defined the roster and yielded draft capital that became key contributors. The team also dealt L’Jarius Sneed in 2024 rather than commit long-term.This decision feels similar. Steve Spagnuolo relies heavily on McDuffie’s flexibility inside and outside. He often shadows top receivers and blitzes off the edge. Replacing that skill set will not come easily.The Rams want to maximize Matthew Stafford’s championship window. The Chiefs want to sustain theirs. That tension fuels these trade rumours. If Kansas City believes it can draft and develop another cornerstone, it may pull the trigger. If not, McDuffie stays and anchors the secondary for another Super Bowl run.
Article Summary: Trent McDuffie earned first-team All-Pro honors and remains one of the most trusted DBs in the league. He enters his age-26 season in 2026 and carries a cap hit north of $13.6 million. The Chiefs can clear that entire figure with a trade.

Article Title: Selena Gomez reflects on 17-year bond with Taylor Swift as she and Travis Kelce prepare for wedding ceremony
Article Text:
Selena Gomez reflects on 17-year bond with Taylor Swift as she and Travis Kelce prepare for wedding ceremony (Getty)

Selena Gomez revisits 17-year journey with Taylor Swift

The Selena Gomez Episode | Friends Keep Secrets

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding ceremony draws global attention



Life looks different for Selena Gomez and Taylor Swift in 2026. One just got married. The other is preparing for her big day. Yet when Gomez spoke this week, she did not dwell on rings or ceremonies. She reflected on 17 years of friendship, heartbreak, and timing that finally worked out.Her comments arrive as Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce quietly gear up for their much-anticipated wedding ceremony.Selena Gomez made the remarks during an appearance on the Friends Keep “Secrets” podcast, hosted by Benny Blanco, Lil Dicky and Kristin Batalucco. When Blanco asked if she and Taylor Swift ever sit back and process their lives now, Gomez offered a perspective.“It’s absolutely unbelievable to come from 17 years of friendship, from multiple heartbreaks and love stories and fun stories in life,” she said on the podcast.Selena Gomez and Taylor Swift first connected in 2008. Since then, both navigated intense public scrutiny. Gomez made it clear that their conversations are not about fame. “When we talk about it, we’re not like, ‘Look at this prosperity.’ It’s more like, actually, this is so cool that you get it,” she explained.The engagement felt surreal to her. “We both ended up fortunately being engaged around the same time, and that was the coolest part,” Gomez said. When Lil Dicky added that they both “ended up with good dudes,” she agreed and said she feels “very lucky.”Gomez announced her engagement to Benny Blanco in December 2024 and later married him in September 2025 in California, where Swift attended and delivered a speech.While Gomez celebrates married life, attention now shifts to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce. The couple confirmed their engagement on August 26, 2025, sharing photos and a heartfelt caption. Since then, they have stayed guarded about exact wedding details.Still, chatter continues. On March 2, 2026, talk show host Graham Norton posted on X that Swift now has a wedding date, sparking fresh speculation. The couple has not officially confirmed any timeline.Swift has shown clear excitement about marriage. During a previous appearance on The Graham Norton Show, she hinted that the wedding would be “huge” while joking about inviting Norton.According to reports, the NFL star and the pop singer will take their vows on June 13, 2026, at the Ocean House in Rhode Island, USA. For Travis Kelce, the offseason brings wedding talk alongside football preparation. For Taylor Swift, it marks another milestone in a headline-filled career.Through it all, Selena Gomez and Taylor Swift remain steady. One reflects on survival. The other steps toward the aisle. And fans now wait for the Swift and Kelce wedding ceremony to finally unfold.
Article Summary: Selena Gomez and Taylor Swift first connected in 2008. Gomez made it clear that their conversations are not about fame. Gomez announced her engagement to Benny Blanco in December 2024 and later married him in September 2025. While Gomez celebrates married life, attention now shifts to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce.

Article Title: "He’s a B***h": Tom Brady blasts Logan Paul with explicit insult as their heated feud takes a shocking turn
Article Text:
Tom Brady Calls Logan Paul a 'B**ch' (Getty Images)

Tom Brady vs Logan Paul: Why the feud exploded before the March 21 flag football clash



Tom Brady and Logan Paul are turning a simple exhibition into something far louder. With the Fanatics Flag Football Classic set for March 21 in Saudi Arabia, Brady has made it clear he is not treating this like a friendly crossover event. The seven time Super Bowl champion took direct aim at Paul’s toughness, brushing off the WWE star’s claims about elite athleticism and questioning whether he belongs anywhere near a football field.The back and forth has built steadily over the past few weeks. What started as playful podcast banter during Super Bowl week has shifted into sharper jabs. Brady may be retired, but he has not lost his competitive edge. And Paul, never one to avoid attention, keeps stepping into the fire.The tension traces back to a conversation on Paul’s podcast, where Brady called wrestling “cute” and cast doubt on whether Paul could handle the physical demands of football. Paul reminded him that he played the sport in school and insisted his athleticism sits at the “highest level.” Brady did not buy it. He pointed to names like Saquon Barkley, Justin Jefferson and Odell Beckham Jr. as examples of what top tier athleticism really looks like.Now the gloves are fully off. In a recent Instagram training video, Brady and former teammate Rob Gronkowski were working out when Gronk praised Paul’s combat sports background. Brady cut in quickly.“Logan Paul’s a b*tch,” Brady said. “Just say he’s a b*tch. Come play with the big boys, you’re lucky you won’t get hit.”The clip spread fast. It felt less like analysis and more like a challenge.Brady, who now calls NFL games for Fox and holds a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, is lending star power to the March 21 event. Paul arrives fresh off the WWE Elimination Chamber main event, won by Randy Orton, and with WrestleMania season approaching in Las Vegas. Rumors continue to swirl about potential opponents, including music superstar Bad Bunny, though nothing has been confirmed.The irony is hard to miss. The Saudi Arabia contest is flag football. No tackling. No blindside hits. Still, the promotional value of this rivalry is obvious. Fans tuning in on FOX Sports and Tubi will see a roster packed with NFL stars such as Saquon Barkley, CeeDee Lamb, Christian McCaffrey, Sauce Gardner, Myles Garrett, Brock Bowers and Maxx Crosby.For Brady, this is about pride. For Paul, it is about proving he belongs in every arena he enters. On March 21, even without pads or contact, both will have something to defend.
Article Summary: Tom Brady and Logan Paul are turning a simple exhibition into something far louder. The Fanatics Flag Football Classic is set for March 21 in Saudi Arabia. Article Title: Sara Saffari breaks silence on viral Puka Nacua dating rumors with simple 4-words
Article Text:
Sara Saffari Addresses Dating Rumors (Instagram/sarasaffari__ and Getty Images)

Sara Saffari dating rumors: Why the Puka Nacua speculation took off and how she shut it down



Sara Saffari Addresses Dating Rumors (Nick Nayersina/YouTube)

Sara Saffari wasted no time clearing the air about Puka Nacua. After days of whispers tying the fitness influencer to the Los Angeles Rams wide receiver, she jumped into the comment section and ended the chatter herself. When an Instagram post from MLFootball claimed the two were “reportedly dating,” Saffari fired back with a short, pointed reply: “we’re siblings chill.” Just like that, the rumor mill met a wall.The speculation did not come from nowhere. Over the past few weeks, Saffari, 25, and Nacua, 24, appeared together in a handful of videos that had fans reading between the lines. A little playful chemistry. A few teasing comments from friends.Add social media to the mix and it does not take much for a story to snowball.The spark came from a Feb. 23 YouTube video on Nick Nayersina’s channel. Filmed at Topgolf in the Los Angeles area, the clip showed Saffari and Nacua laughing and trading playful remarks. Nayersina leaned into it, calling them a “great duo” and later a “power duo.” At one point he insisted that “great duos stay together.” Saffari quickly pushed back, telling him to “stop saying that.”In another moment, after Nayersina described them as the “cutest thing,” Saffari shot back that he was “delusional.” Nayersina kept stirring the pot, joking to Nacua, “She got mad because you guys have great chemistry. I wish I captured you guys up there golfing and poking each other with the club.” Nacua turned and asked, “You don’t want to have fun?” Without missing a beat, Saffari replied, “I love having fun! I’m like the queen of fun!”Then came the airport clip. On Feb. 28, a TikTok video showed the pair walking through LAX. Nacua wore a black hoodie and sunglasses. Saffari had on a green tank top. At one point, they appeared to be holding hands. That image shifted the conversation from playful to serious in the eyes of fans.Nacua has not addressed the latest round of rumors. His name, though, has often found its way into headlines beyond football. In January, he was spotted at dinner in West Hollywood with influencer Hannah Stocking. That outing followed his public flirtation with actress Sydney Sweeney, when he reposted her quote about wanting someone to “go skydiving” with and added, “Love skydiving.” She did not respond.On the field, Nacua’s résumé speaks louder than gossip. The Nevada native closed his third season with the Rams in January, still riding the wave of a historic rookie year in 2023 when he set league marks for receiving yards in a season by a rookie and receptions in a game by a rookie. He also faced scrutiny in December after making an antisemitic gesture on a livestream, later saying it had been “suggested” to him and that he “had no idea this act was antisemitic in nature and perpetuated harmful stereotypes against Jewish people. " He added, “I deeply apologize to anyone who was offended by my actions as I do not stand for any form of racism, bigotry or hate of another group of people.”For now, at least according to Saffari, the story is simple. Friends. Not romance. And in the age of viral clips, sometimes a single comment is all it takes to reset the narrative.
Article Summary: Sara Saffari and Puka Nacua have been linked to each other for weeks. The pair have appeared together in a handful of videos. Safari responded to rumors on Instagram by saying, "we're siblings chill"

Article Title: NFL trade news: Cowboys, Patriots, Eagles linked as Maxx Crosby trade talk intensifies
Article Text:
Maxx Crosby’s future with the Las Vegas Raiders is suddenly uncertain as trade rumors intensify ahead of the 2026 season. The All-Pro defensive end hinted at meeting his “new” head coach during a podcast appearance, fueling speculation. With contenders like the Cowboys, Patriots, and Eagles reportedly interested, Las Vegas could seek valuable draft picks if it commits to a rebuild.

Maxx Crosby trade rumors heat up as Raiders star hints at next chapter

The Las Vegas Raiders may be standing at the edge of a franchise-altering decision. As the 2026 NFL season approaches, league insiders believe All-Pro defensive end Maxx Crosby could be on the move. After seven intense seasons in silver and black, Crosby has little left to prove individually. The wins, however, have not followed. That reality is now fueling serious NFL trade rumors, with contenders circling and front offices quietly weighing offers.Crosby added intrigue during a recent podcast appearance when he referenced meeting his “new” head coach. He did not name a team, but that single phrase sent shockwaves through league circles.It was subtle. It was calculated. And it confirmed what many already suspect. The Raiders are listening.Crosby remains one of the NFL’s most disruptive pass rushers. He recorded double-digit sacks for the fourth time in his career last season and posted 28 tackles for loss, his highest total since entering the league in 2019. That level of production at 28 years old makes him a premium asset. Any contender looking for a defensive identity shift would see him as a centerpiece, not just a rental.The Dallas Cowboys, New England Patriots, and Philadelphia Eagles have all been loosely connected to the situation. Each team has cap flexibility and postseason aspirations. Adding Crosby instantly upgrades their edge presence and locker room leadership.From the Raiders’ perspective, the timing may make sense. Las Vegas holds the number one overall pick in the upcoming draft and has been linked to Indiana quarterback Fernando Mendoza. If the organization commits to a long-term rebuild under a new signal caller, flipping Crosby for high draft capital could accelerate that process. Multiple premium picks would allow the Raiders to address both offensive and defensive needs in one bold swing.Crosby, a former fourth-round selection from Eastern Michigan, has grown into a five-time Pro Bowler and two-time second-team All-Pro. His value will not be discounted. If a trade happens, it will reshape more than one roster.The only question now is simple. Who is that “new” head coach?
Article Summary: Maxx Crosby hinted at meeting his “new’ head coach during a podcast appearance. Crosby recorded double-digit sacks for the fourth time in his career last season and posted 28 tackles for loss, his highest total since entering the league in 2019. Dallas Cowboys, New England Patriots, and Philadelphia Eagles are all loosely connected to the situation.

Article Title: “Where are you now?”: Ex-NFL player slams Iran’s leadership and questions the league and Roger Goodell’s silence
Article Text:
Former NFL offensive lineman Shar Pourdanesh voiced strong support for action against Iran’s Islamic regime, calling it unrepresentative of the Iranian people. He praised U.S. and Israeli efforts and urged Iranians to reclaim their country. Pourdanesh also criticized the NFL for remaining silent, questioning why the league has not spoken out on the ongoing conflict and reported deaths.

Shar Pourdanesh calls for freedom and challenges the NFL

Former NFL offensive lineman Shar Pourdanesh is no longer blocking defenders on Sundays. Instead, he is using his voice to speak about the country where he was born. As conflict intensifies and the Islamic Republic faces renewed pressure, Pourdanesh has emerged as one of the most outspoken former players of Iranian descent calling for change.Born in Tehran and later becoming the NFL’s first Iranian born player, Pourdanesh spent seven seasons in the league with Washington and Pittsburgh. Now retired, he has turned to social media to celebrate what he believes is a turning point for Iranians around the world. His message is direct. It is emotional. And it leaves little room for ambiguity.ID@undefinedCaption not available.When military strikes against the Islamic regime began, Pourdanesh posted, “This is a great day for all Iranians across the world.Thank you, President Trump, thank you to the nation of Israel. Thank you for everybody that has been standing up for my people, my brothers and sisters in Iran across the world. This is a great day.“The infamous dictator is dead – the one person who has contributed to deaths of hundreds of thousands of Iranians and other people around the world, if not more. So, congratulations to my Iranian brothers and sisters. Now, go and take back the country.”His support did not stop there. In another post, he made his position even clearer: “[The] Islamic Republic does not represent the Iranian people. Islam does not represent the Iranian people. For almost 50 years, the Iranian people and our country of Iran has been taken hostage by a terrorist regime, and it's time to take that regime down.”Pourdanesh has also directed frustration toward the NFL. During his playing career, he says the league encouraged players to stand for social causes. Now he questions its silence.“I did everything they asked, and now I ask the NFL this: Where are you now? Why haven't we heard a single word out of the NFL? NFL, Commissioner Roger Goodell, all the NFL teams out there, all the players who say they stand for social justice, where are you now?“Why haven't we heard a single word out of you with regard to the people who have been killed as of today? The very values you claim to espouse are being trampled right now. Why haven't we heard a single word?”For Pourdanesh, this moment is personal. His career may be over, but his connection to Iran remains strong. And in his view, silence is no longer an option.
Article Summary: Shar Pourdanesh is one of the most outspoken former players of Iranian descent calling for change. The former offensive lineman spent seven seasons in the league with Washington and Pittsburgh. He has turned to social media to celebrate what he believes is a turning point for Iranians.

Article Title: Brittany Mahomes’ old mocking and hateful Taylor Swift tweets resurface, and Swifties are furious
Article Text:
Old tweets allegedly from Brittany Mahomes criticizing Taylor Swift have resurfaced, sparking backlash online. The posts, dating back years, questioned Swift’s songwriting and success. Amplified by a parody account, the screenshots reignited debate among fans, especially given Swift’s ties to the Kansas City Chiefs. Neither Mahomes nor Swift has publicly addressed the renewed controversy.

Brittany Mahomes dragged into Swiftie storm after past comments resurface

A social media post that has come back to life has caused more problems between NFL and pop culture fans. A parody account recently spread old tweets that were supposedly sent by Brittany Mahomes, saying that she made fun of Taylor Swift years before the singer started dating Travis Kelce. The post quickly went viral, mixing politics, old comments, and current issues related to the Mahomes family into one big storm.Swift's presence around the Kansas City Chiefs is still making headlines, which is why the renewed interest is happening now. Fans are already split on how much celebrities should affect sports, and the new screenshots only made things worse. Supporters and critics alike began dissecting what was written, when it was written, and whether context changes perception.The screenshots circulating online show past posts allegedly made from Brittany Mahomes’ account, including commentary about Taylor Swift’s songwriting themes.One post reads, “Taylor swift..I wanna know when your gonna find something different to write about besides boys and relationships.. #timeforsomethingnew.”Another says, “you could have just shaken it off like Taylor swift said” and tags Patrick Mahomes . A third reads, “Taylor swift winning everything<<<< 😡.”Though the tweets appear to date back several years, critics argue that their tone clashes with the current narrative of unity between the Chiefs’ inner circle and Swift’s fanbase.Others point out that online commentary from a decade ago often lacks context and may not reflect present relationships.The viral post also talks about Brittany Mahomes' public political views and how she defended her brother-in-law when sexual assault allegations were made against him. Those things have made the argument stronger, especially among Swift's more politically vocal fans.Mixing pop culture, politics, and unresolved issues has made a complicated digital firestorm.It's important to remember that the account that shared the screenshots calls itself a parody account.Like with a lot of viral posts, you should check the facts and get the whole story before making any decisions.As of now, neither Brittany Mahomes nor Taylor Swift has said anything about the tweets that have come back.This is still clear. In the age of digital archives, nothing really goes away.People can talk about things in ways that are surprising years after old posts come back. The talk is still going on online for now, thanks to fans' loyalty, political differences, and the internet's strong memory.
Article Summary: Old tweets allegedly from Brittany Mahomes criticizing Taylor Swift have resurfaced, sparking backlash online. The posts, dating back years, questioned Swift’s songwriting and success. Amplified by a parody account, the screenshots reignited debate among fans, especially given Swift's ties to the Kansas City Chiefs.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Tom Brady allegedly try to cheat on Gisele Bündchen with Ivanka Trump before their divorce?
Article Text:
A memoir by Gavin Newsom claims Donald Trump once hoped Tom Brady would date Ivanka Trump and even shared her number with him. Brady reportedly left a message, but Ivanka never called back, as she was already in love with Jared Kushner. Brady later denied any romantic involvement, saying they never dated.

Did Tom Brady secretly contact Ivanka Trump during his marriage to Gisele Bündchen?

A fresh political memoir has revived an old piece of celebrity lore involving Tom Brady and Ivanka Trump . In Young Man in a Hurry: A Memoir of Discovery, Gavin Newsom recounts a 2018 helicopter ride with Donald Trump and Jared Kushner that took an unexpectedly personal turn. According to Newsom, Trump once hoped the NFL legend would date his daughter. The story hinges on a phone call that was made, and never returned.The anecdote surfaces years after the moment allegedly occurred, yet it adds another chapter to the intersection of politics, sports, and celebrity culture. Brady’s name, already tied to championship rings and high profile relationships, briefly entered the Trump family orbit. But as the memoir suggests, the idea never moved beyond a missed connection.In the book, Gavin Newsom writes that during a function when Tom Brady was single, the quarterback asked Donald Trump for Ivanka’s phone number.Donald Trump reportedly shared it. Brady called and left a message but Ivanka did not respond.Newsom claims Donald Trump later confronted his daughter, saying, “Jesus, you know, Tom Brady. What the hell is going on? Why aren’t you calling this guy back?” Ivanka reportedly told her father she was already in love with Kushner.The memoir describes Donald Trump joking about the situation while pointing toward Kushner, adding, “Not even close, right, Gavin? Tom Brady.Tom Brady.”Brady addressed the rumors years later during a 2020 appearance on The Howard Stern Show. Reflecting on the speculation, he said, “That was a long time ago in my life. Did I consider dating her? No, there was never really that where we ever dated or anything like that.”Ivanka Trump married Kushner in 2009 and they share three children. Kushner later served as a senior adviser during Trump’s presidency. Brady, meanwhile, built a Hall of Fame career, winning seven Super Bowls with the New England Patriots and Tampa Bay Buccaneers. His personal life included relationships with Bridget Moynahan and a long marriage to Gisele Bündchen.If Newsom’s account is accurate, the episode was brief and awkward. A voicemail, a father’s enthusiasm, and a daughter’s firm choice. In the end, it became just another story in the long, intertwined history of American fame and power.
Article Summary: A memoir by Gavin Newsom claims Donald Trump once hoped Tom Brady would date Ivanka Trump and even shared her number with him. In Young Man in a Hurry: A Memoir of Discovery, Newsom recounts a 2018 helicopter ride with Donald Trump and Jared Kushner that took an unexpectedly personal turn. The story hinges on a phone call that was made, and never returned.

Article Title: Fact check: Has Cardi B found love again with a new man after her dramatic breakup with Stefon Diggs?
Article Text:
Has Cardi B found love again with a new man after her dramatic breakup with Stefon Diggs?(Image via CBS and Getty Images)

Has Cardi B moved on with a new boyfriend after her dramatic and controversial break up with Stefon Diggs?



Cardi B was always public about how much Stefon Diggs meant to her



Stefon Diggs, the New England Patriots’ popular wide receiver, has stayed away from all the mess after Cardi B ended things with him, just hours before he brutally lost against the Seattle Seahawks in the Super Bowl LX.While Cardi B has seemingly made it clear that she is no longer interested in rekindling her romance with Stefon Diggs, the star player has remained silent. Amid all the mess, a rumor about Cardi B finding a new man has sparked panic.A few hours ago, a page on X claimed that Cardi B has moved on in life with a new man as pictures showed an unknown man kneeling down in front of her with a huge bouquet of red roses.This post sparked panic among fans; while some criticised her for moving on in life so soon after ending things with Stefon Diggs, others rooted for her future.However, the rumor is entirely false. The pictures seem AI generated and there are no reports or any statements made by Cardi B which hint at her moving on in her life after her dramatic break up with Stefon Diggs.At this point in time, the popular Grammy winner Cardi B has not commented on the rumor yet as she seems busy with her career.Over the last few weeks, Cardi B has remained fully focused on touring the country as all her shows have been sold out.Though Cardi B and Stefon Diggs have had a pretty dramatic break up, the actual reason behind it is not known.As per reports, there have been many rumors of the New England Patriots’ star player, Stefon Diggs, allegedly cheating on Cardi but nothing has been confirmed yet.Back in September 2025, the popular Grammy winner made an appearance on CBS News where she opened up about being in love with Stefon Diggs.Cardi B opened up about dating after a brutal separation with Offset as she said, "remember what you dealt with when you were 16. So restarting again, yeah. And being open. And vulnerable."The popular Grammy winner added, "One time he just told me. ‘Let me heal you. Give me a chance for me to heal you.’ And it’s like, ‘Okay…'"
Article Summary: A rumor about Cardi B finding a new man has sparked panic among her fans. The popular Grammy winner has not commented on the rumor yet as she seems busy with her career. There have been many rumors of the New England Patriots’ star player, Stefon Diggs, allegedly cheating on Cardi.
